name: rigal
description: RIGAL — The universal AI coding harness. Any model, any provider, any platform.

scripts.build: bun run packages/core/build.ts && bun run packages/llm/build.ts && bun run packages/integrations/build.ts && bun run packages/rigal/build.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun --eval "import './packages/core/tsconfig.json'; import './packages/llm/tsconfig.json'; import './packages/rigal/tsconfig.json'" 2>/dev/null; bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/llm/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/rigal/tsconfig.json
